frontier: EinsteinArena scorer/verifier hardening — currently closed pending a concrete authorized reopener.
action: Ran one bounded, read-only receipt-lineage and frontier-record parity replay; recorded the negative closure and updated the handoff gate.
verified: Prior receipt, frontier identity/status/priority/session, lineage, selector artifacts, and protected-data integrity all matched. No authorized reopener was recorded.
result: Pass: rotate away without rerunning scorer or static-gate diagnostics. The historical *global* queue digest no longer replays because other queue records advanced; this is provenance drift, not evidence of scorer/source-test drift.
next_gate: Reopen only for authorized remote CI observation, an explicit pre-commit wiring request, one explicitly selected legacy submission-surface promotion, or demonstrated scorer/static-gate source-test drift.
boundary_held: No production Atlas writes, external submissions, git pushes, or training unless explicitly authorized.
